metadata.title: Natanael da Matta - Full Stack Developer
metadata.description: Portfolio of Natanael da Matta - Full Stack Developer specializing in React, Next.js, and modern web technologies
metadata.keywords: developer, portfolio, react, nextjs, full stack, web developer

home.title: Software Developer
home.bio1: I'm Natanael, a <bold>full-stack developer</bold> with over <bold>4 years of experience</bold> in the tech industry.
home.bio2: I started my career as an IT Specialist, and evolved into developing modern web applications, eventually leading development teams.
home.bio3: Outside of work, I enjoy <italic>football, board games</italic>, and <italic>exploring new video games</italic>.
home.bio4: Check out my <linkCareer>career path</linkCareer> or explore some of my <linkProjects>projects</linkProjects>.

career.title: Career - Natanael da Matta
career.description: Work experience and education history of Natanael da Matta, Full-Stack Developer.
career.heading: Career
career.intro1: I've worked for different companies, <bold>both in person and remotely</bold>, with teams around the world. I enjoy taking on new challenges and learning new technologies.
career.intro2: Here you'll find a <bold>timeline</bold> of where I've worked.

jobs.title: Full-Stack Developer & Scrum Master
jobs.description:
Insurance brokerage firm serving clients throughout California.
-Participated in the development of a full-stack CRM application (MERN, MVC) used by 80 daily users, unifying customer management, payments, policies, and document handling into one platform, replacing a set of legacy tools.
-Optimized MongoDB and SQL queries across core workflows, eliminating redundant data fetches and reducing page load times across the application.
-Led a 4-person team as Scrum Master, acting as the bridge between stakeholders and developers, maintained sprint velocity, cleared blockers, and kept priorities aligned across the delivery cycle.

jobs.title: IT Support Specialist
jobs.description:
Software development company specializing in commercial business solutions.
-Delivered L1–L2 technical support and resolved 10–15 support tickets per week for a proprietary CRM, and onboarded 20+ clients, reducing go-live time by standardizing installation and setup procedures.
-Performed code and SQL Server database validation, analysis, and troubleshooting to support commercial software products in production environments.

educationItems.title: B.S. – Software Development
educationItems.description: Currently completing a Bachelor's degree in Software Development (online and asynchronous), with a focus on web development and software engineering. I work on programming projects both individually and in teams, collaborating remotely.

educationItems.title: A.A.S – Software Development
educationItems.description: Associate degree focused on programming, web development, databases, and software design.

projects.title: Projects - Natanael da Matta
projects.description: Personal projects built by Natanael da Matta to solve real problems and practice new technologies.
projects.heading: Projects
projects.intro2: Some built to solve real problems, and others created to practice and learn new technologies.

items.title: unfollowz
items.description: Open-source and privacy focused web app that lets you see who doesn't follow you back on Instagram.

contact.title: Contact - Natanael da Matta
contact.description: Get in touch with Natanael da Matta via LinkedIn or GitHub for collaborations and opportunities.
contact.heading: Let's Connect!
contact.body1: I'm open to <bold>new opportunities</bold> and collaborations in software development.
contact.body2: If you'd like to talk about a project, a role, or just connect, feel free to <bold>reach out through LinkedIn or GitHub</bold> below.
